title: Connectivity Graph
description: Tiered netlist-stage connectivity of a package: die pads, bumps, substrate nets, balls, and board pins, plus the typed edges connecting adjacent tiers. Produced by the ingestion parsers (AIF, Excel/CSV) and consumed by the verifier checks and ECO diff.

rev.description: Revision identifier of the design snapshot.

source_files.description: Provenance: the input files this graph was ingested from.

units.description: Length units for all node xy coordinates in this graph.

nodes.description: All connectivity nodes across every tier. Node ids must be unique within the graph.

edges.description: Typed connections between nodes on adjacent tiers.

kind.description: Which connectivity tier the node lives on.

name.description: Human-facing name (e.g. net name, pad name, ball designator).

xy.description: Physical position [x, y] in graph units. Optional (logical nets may have none).

grid.description: Grid coordinate for balls: row designator plus column index.

row.description: Row designator (e.g. 'A', 'AB'); alphabet may skip JEDEC letters I,O,Q,S,X,Z per the ingestion mapping.

diff_partner.description: Node id (or net name) of this node's differential partner, if any.

match_group.description: Length/timing match-group identifier this node belongs to.

domain.description: Power domain this node belongs to (e.g. 'VDD_CORE').

role.description: Electrical role of the node. 'nc' = no-connect. Only gnd/pwr nets may legitimately fan out to many balls.

source.description: Node id of the edge's source (higher tier, e.g. die_pad).

target.description: Node id of the edge's target (adjacent lower tier, e.g. bump).

kind.description: Optional edge type; conventionally the tier pair it bridges (e.g. 'die_pad__bump', 'bump__substrate_net', 'substrate_net__ball', 'ball__board_pin').
